value.stringValue: No Products found. Please select a Valid Pricebook

Flow.description: Screen Flow - Opportunity Configurator, handles selecting, editing and price configuration
Flow.label: scr - Opportunity - Configurator

fields.name: dpt_01_01_01_Pricebook
fields.fieldText:
Please select a Pricebook with the button 'Choose Pricebook' on the Product Related List .


Click Finish when done.

value.stringValue: Quantity:standard:number_input, DiscountAmount__c:standard:currency, ListPrice:utility:currency, UnitPrice:utility:currency, No_Discount_Allowed__c:utility:check, Account_Margin__c:utility:percent, TotalPrice:utility:currency
Product_Name__c:310, ProductCode:135, Quantity:110, DiscountAmount__c:110, ListPrice:110, UnitPrice:110, No_Discount_Allowed__c:110, Margin__c:110, TotalPrice:110

Name:310, ProductCode:135, Quantity__c:100, Discount__c:100, AccountPrice__c:110, No_Discount_Allowed__c:80, Quantity_Price_1__c:110, Quantity_Price_2__c:110, Quantity_Price_3__c:110, Quantity_Price_4__c:110

textTemplates.name: ttErrorMessage
textTemplates.text:
Oeps, Something went wrong.


Your Administrator has been notified.


Details on this message:


{!vErrorMessage}

{!$Flow.FaultMessage}
